name: Base plan + super top-up vs direct high cover plan comparison
description: User evaluating whether to buy a ₹5L base plan plus ₹20L super top-up versus a single ₹25L comprehensive plan

input.message: Should I buy a base plan of ₹5L + super top-up of ₹20L, or directly buy a ₹25L plan?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response provide a substantive comparison with numbers to guide the decision?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) super top-up deductible matching base plan, (2) indicative premium comparison (₹5L base + ₹20L super top-up vs ₹25L standalone), (3) claim coordination complexity with two policies, (4) when base+super works best vs single high-cover plan?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the super top-up mechanism (kicks in when single claim exceeds deductible) accurately explained?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No invented premium figures without appropriate qualifications for age/insurer variance? Disclaimer present?
